title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Inclusive Finance Collections Limited
body: "Application number 5075  Applicant Inclusive Finance Limited objected to the name used by Inclusive Finance  Collections Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 14 March 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Inclusive Finance  Collections Limited is changed to 15220030, LTD. "
